data.content: Implementation complete for foolery-5edd. Branch: codex/foolery-5edd-planning-d. Commit: 505d7e628275e5e9577872ebfe114ea16deb8876. Added docs/APPROVALS.md, docs/scripts index links, and a manual-only approval harness at scripts/test-cli-approvals-manual.sh plus .mjs support modules. The wrapper backs up/restores Foolery and OpenCode config with manifest/checksum verification; the driver can force one provider, start/reuse Foolery, POST /api/terminal, watch SSE for FOOLERY APPROVAL REQUIRED, verify/click the approvals UI, require provider-specific continuation markers/files, and report PASS/BLOCKED/FAIL. Known current blockers are surfaced precisely for Codex approvalPolicy, Claude bypass launch, OpenCode permission.asked extraction, and missing approve UI. Gates passed: node driver help, shell help/restore dry path, OpenCode blocked dry path, git diff --check, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
